{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Incarnation of Ragnarus
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Incarnation of Ragnarus]] is capable of inflicting destruction on [[Cana]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Incarnation of Ragnarus]] rules [[Damasca]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c25">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
